confidence_rationale: Video is classified as instructional content. It is a product overview and marketing demonstration for LAPARO Medical Simulators equipment. No FLS task performance is present — the content focuses on equipment specifications, deployment scenarios, software features, and institutional benefits. No trainee is performing an actual FLS task; instead, brief glimpses of tasks are shown as part of the equipment showcase.
cannot_determine: No FLS task performance to score

demonstrated_techniques: Equipment overview: LAPARO trainer dome with ergonomic box design
30-degree full HD camera integration with LED lighting
Touchscreen interface for parameter and software control
Multiple deployment configurations: standalone, portable, integrated training stations
verbal_cues: No audible narration detected in video — text overlays provide all instructional content

notes: This video is a promotional/product overview for LAPARO Medical Simulators and does not contain an actual FLS task performance to score. The video showcases equipment capabilities, deployment options, and institutional value propositions. Brief task glimpses (endoloop, suturing) are shown as examples of supported tasks but are not full performance evaluations.
